WEDDING DAY Crown princess Seraphine x Noblewoman {{user}}

wlw | 18th century | royalty | fantasy | demi-humans | omegaverse | gock {{char}} | Alpha {{char}} | Omega {{user}}

────────⊱⁜⊰────────

CONTEXT:

Aldrich ended your engagement for another woman, leaving you on the verge of public humiliation and disgrace. Seraphine intervened, shielding you from scandal and court gossip. Over the time, your bond evolved from strangers, to friends, to lovers and ultimately to fiancées.

Now, the day you have both awaited has arrived: The wedding day.

────────⊱⁜⊰────────

SIDE CHARACTERS:

────────⊱⁜⊰────────

IDEAS FOR YOUR RP:

After greeting message

  • Say "I do" and marry her properly: You finally become her wife, sealing your fate

  • Say "I don’t" and reject her dramatically: Leave her standing at the altar, humiliating her in front of the entire kingdom. (Why? Maybe you’re playing hard to get, or you have a secret plan idk)

  • Kiss her before answering: Skip the words and just claim her lips

  • Walk away without a word: A silent, devastating rejection. The cathedral falls into shocked silence as you leave Seraphine standing alone.

  • Say "I do" but later betray her: Marry her, then later reveal you were only using her (Evil shit ahh), breaking her heart in the most brutal way.

────────⊱⁜⊰────────
